signUp.title: Sign Up
signUp.welcome: Sign up to control your finances
signUp.success: Welcome, {{name}}! Verify your email to continue.

forgotPassword.title: Password Recovery
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email to receive the verification code.

auth.forgotDescription: To recover your password, a verification code has been sent to your email.
auth.signUpDescription: To complete your registration, a verification code has been sent to your email.
auth.loginDescription: To complete your login, a verification code has been sent to your email.
auth.loginSuccess: You have successfully logged in! Welcome, {{name}}.
auth.verificationError: Verification error. Please check your code and try again.

resetPassword.title: Change Password
resetPassword.description: Enter your new password. You will be redirected to the login page.
resetPassword.success: Password successfully changed, please log in.
resetPassword.error: Error changing password. Please try again.

errors.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.passwordChars: Password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one number

add.description: Create a new spending category by choosing an appropriate name and the icon that best fits.
add.error: Error creating category. Please review the fields and try again.

modify.description: Modify the name or icon of any category. This will not affect already registered spendings or the total amount. Or delete the category—this will remove all associated expenses.
modify.tableCaption: List of your current spending categories
modify.error: Error modifying the category. Please review the fields and try again.

dialog.title: Confirm modification
dialog.description: Are you sure you want to change the category {{icon}}{{name}} to {{newIcon}}{{newName}}?

delete.description: Delete the category you want. This action will delete all spendings in that category.
delete.tableCaption: List of your current spending categories
delete.error: Error deleting category. Please try again.

dialog.title: Confirm deletion
dialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete the category {{icon}}{{name}}? All related spendings will be removed.

add.description: Register a new spending via the form or by uploading a receipt, invoice, or similar document.
add.error: Error registering spending. Please review the fields and try again.
add.success: {{name}} has been registered with an amount of €{{amount}} under the {{category}} category

view.title: View Spendings
view.description: Check your spendings by month and sort them as you wish.

amount.positive: Amount must be a positive number

expirationDate.future: Expiration date must be in the future
expirationDate.sameDay: The start day of the expense must match the expiration date

linkBankAccount.title: Link Bank Account
linkBankAccount.description: Connect your bank account to extract transaction data.

createGoal.title: Create Saving Goal
createGoal.description: Set a savings goal and start saving.

editGoals.title: Edit Saving Goal
editGoals.description: Modify the details of your saving goal.

editCategory.title: Edit Category
editCategory.description: Update the details of an existing category or delete it.

viewCharts.title: View Charts
viewCharts.description: Visualize your expenses for this month through different charts.

compareCharts.title: Compare Stats
compareCharts.description: Compare your spendings across different months.
